findings.message: Agent defines no example blocks; zero examples leave the model without calibration anchors for correct vs. incorrect behavior.
No output format section; agent provides no guidance on expected response structure, length constraints, or rendering conventions.
Vague quantifier: 'genuinely unclear' — does not define a measurable threshold for when to enter plan mode.
Vague quantifier: 'genuinely independent' — leaves model to judge parallelism threshold without a defined criterion.
Vague quantifier: '尽量' (try to / as much as possible) appears 5 times (lines 27, 29, 31, 32, 46); each instance avoids a concrete trigger or threshold.

spawn() called with shell:true; command string is derived from process.argv.slice(2) or HELLO2CC_CCSTATUSLINE_COMMAND env var, creating a shell injection surface if either source is attacker-controlled.
Default downstream command is 'npx -y ccstatusline@latest'; @latest is unpinned and will silently pull future versions on every invocation, introducing supply-chain risk.
fetch() to api.github.com at runtime; GH_TOKEN / GITHUB_TOKEN env vars are read and sent as an Authorization Bearer header. Dev-only utility; not reachable from any hook invocation.
HELLO2CC_DEBUG_ROUTE_PATH env var controls the destination path of writeFileSync without path validation; a maliciously set env var could direct writes outside the repo.
Agent defines no example blocks; zero examples leave the model without calibration anchors for correct vs. incorrect behavior.
No output format section; agent provides no guidance on expected response structure, length constraints, or rendering conventions.
Vague quantifier: 'genuinely unclear' — does not define a measurable threshold for when to enter plan mode.
Vague quantifier: 'genuinely independent' — leaves model to judge parallelism threshold without a defined criterion.
Vague quantifier: '尽量' (try to / as much as possible) appears 5 times (lines 27, 29, 31, 32, 46); each instance avoids a concrete trigger or threshold.

spawn() called with shell:true; command string is derived from process.argv.slice(2) or HELLO2CC_CCSTATUSLINE_COMMAND env var, creating a shell injection surface if either source is attacker-controlled.
fetch() to api.github.com at runtime; GH_TOKEN / GITHUB_TOKEN env vars are read and sent as an Authorization Bearer header. Dev-only utility; not reachable from any hook invocation.
HELLO2CC_DEBUG_ROUTE_PATH env var controls the destination path of writeFileSync without path validation; a maliciously set env var could direct writes outside the repo.
Default downstream command is 'npx -y ccstatusline@latest'; @latest is unpinned and will silently pull future versions on every invocation, introducing supply-chain risk.
